meta_title: For Freelancers: debugging with AI to Solve stuck with basic apps (Intermediate Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to debugging with AI and overcome stuck with basic apps. A Intermediate-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.
h2_structure: The Problem: stuck with basic apps

content.seo_title: Debugging with AI: Master Complex Apps for Freelancers
content.seo_description: Stop getting stuck on complex bugs. Learn how to leverage Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your freelance development workflow and ship faster.
content.answer_block: To overcome development plateaus, integrate AI-driven debugging into your workflow. By using Antigravity for architectural visualization and Claude Code for iterative CLI-based troubleshooting, you transform opaque errors into actionable tasks. This synergy allows you to bypass hours of manual tracing and deploy production-ready features for your clients significantly faster.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is waiting, and you are staring at a stack trace that looks like a cryptic ancient language. You have built the basic CRUD apps, but now you are hitting the architectural walls that separate hobbyists from high-earning freelance architects. The frustration of being 'stuck' is not a lack of skill; it is a limitation of manual debugging cycles.

Relief has arrived in the form of autonomous AI agents. By shifting your mindset from 'fixer' to 'orchestrator,' you can leverage advanced toolsets like Antigravity and Claude Code to identify root causes in seconds, not hours. It is time to stop wrestling with your IDE and start shipping high-impact solutions.

steps.title: Contextualize the Error with Antigravity
steps.description: Before changing code, map the dependency graph to understand where the data flow breaks.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current project directory and generate a dependency map highlighting the flow between the authentication middleware and the database controller. Identify potential circular dependencies.

steps.title: Automated Trace Analysis
steps.description: Feed the stack trace into Claude Code to get an immediate architectural diagnosis.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the trace log provided. Explain the root cause of the null pointer exception in the context of our existing service layer architecture.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'Analyze this stack trace: [paste_trace] and suggest a patch'

steps.title: Isolate the Bug with Unit Tests
steps.description: Use AI to generate a reproduction test case to ensure the fix is verifiable.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a minimal Jest test case that reproduces the identified bug in the user service. Ensure it fails before we apply the fix.

steps.title: Implement the Fix via Iterative Refinement
steps.description: Apply the patch cautiously, verifying with the AI agent that no regressions were introduced.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor the authentication logic to handle the null pointer case. Ensure the fix follows the existing design patterns in the codebase.
steps.claude_code_command: claude edit 'Refactor user service to handle null pointer in auth middleware'

steps.title: Final Verification and Documentation
steps.description: Automate the documentation of the fix so your client understands the change.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Summarize the bug fix and the architectural changes made for a technical client report.
steps.claude_code_command: claude commit 'Fix: Resolved null pointer in auth middleware via dependency injection'

pro_tips: Always run 'claude status' before starting a new session to ensure the agent has the correct context of your current branch.
Use Antigravity to visualize 'dead code' paths; often, the bug isn't in your logic, but in an unused dependency that's polluting the runtime.
Create a 'system_prompt.md' in your root folder; Claude Code will read this automatically to enforce your personal coding standards.
When debugging complex state, ask the AI to 'trace the data lifecycle' rather than 'fix the bug' to uncover hidden architectural debt.
Treat the AI as a junior partner: verify every critical path change with a manual 'smoke test' before pushing to production.
content.next_steps: Integrate these tools into your CI/CD pipeline to automate initial bug triaging before you even open your IDE.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting bugs drain your billable hours and start delivering robust, high-value code that keeps clients coming back. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
